# Handover Report Template

Use at the end of a sprint or when handing work to another AI/tool.

## Summary

<What changed and why.>

## Repository

- Repo:
- Branch:
- PR:
- Commit SHA:

## Files created

- `<path>` — <purpose>

## Files modified

- `<path>` — <change summary>

## Validation

| Command | Result |
|---|---|
| `<command>` | passed/failed/not run |

## Behaviour changes

- Runtime behaviour changed: yes/no
- Public behaviour changed: yes/no
- External writes added: yes/no
- Dependencies added: yes/no

## Safety notes

- approvals required
- rollback notes
- known caveats

## What future prompts can omit

<Durable facts now stored in Beam or the target repo.>

## Recommended next sprint

<Smallest useful next step.>
